title: Modding YOUR Comments V1
description: 20+ features from my modding your comments series, all from the viewer's suggestions!
body:
## THIS MOD MIGHT NOT BE TOO STABLE!!! FEATURES MIGHT BE BROKEN!!! AND THERE ARE NO CRAFTING RECIPES.
## ### 


For bug reports and suggestions on how to improve **_this_** mod please visit my [discord](https://discord.gg/wR6SMnJKbt).

For ideas on _new_ features for _**other new mods**_ please visit my [discord](https://discord.gg/wR6SMnJKbt) or go to my [channel](https://www.youtube.com/@GuyWithGreenscreen) and leave a comment on the newest video.

HAVE FUN!!!

All Features:



Part 2:
